X.value: Number of X-ray machine failures per week, following a Poisson distribution with λ=2
X.description: The random variable representing the number of X-ray machine failures per week in the laboratory, which follows a Poisson distribution with parameter λ=2. The answer computes P(X ≥ 3) using this distribution.

repair_capacity.description: The maximum number of machines the laboratory can repair per week internally. Failures beyond this threshold (i.e., X ≥ 3) require an outside specialist contractor.
